title: EMP's Rounded Logs
description: Makes logs rounder, not too round though, this is still Minecraft
body:
# Do you ever wish that Minecraft's logs were rounder? Well, this pack is the answer to your question!

## What? 🤔

Makes vanilla logs look rounder. 🟤

## How 🤷‍♂️

By applying a **different model** to logs through a resource pack.

## Help! My logs aren't round! 😫

You may have made one of two mistakes or a misconception.

> 1. You didn't install the pack correctly, watch this video on how if you don't understand - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X3idBsCTNio
> 
> 2. You may need to **reload** your game or you have a pack **overriding** this one, to reload the game while in a world, press `F3 +` `T`, and make sure that this pack is at the **top** of your resource pack list.
> 
> 3. You **thought** the logs were going to look like **perfect** circles. No, this is Minecraft so the logs are still **low poly**.

## Help! Only some logs are round! 😩

This pack only makes logs that are vertical *(Like the ones in trees)* round that way when you place a **horizontal** log next to a **vertical** one, they will fit together instead of looking **broken**.
